{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322060626A82398BA673CAF66325A"}"},"total":240},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7602994014624088856","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"故事非常新颖，好看的停不下来，节奏把控的十分好，读起来超带感"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770212652,"group_id":"7593269388568955966","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"新手作家 多多包涵 虚心接受建议","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1BSZW9FvwTbio62GkO3+/KyDmAGAkQ249OqX6JzpuWY","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/8ed5e8eb6ee74f36924e9129982744b0~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776703676&x-signature=9Z2SqIVVgg3VqFpviYQZiwtsrxI%3D","user_id":"1289067519811069","user_name":"我有百宝箱和万能钥匙"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1289067519811069","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7593269388568955966","book_info":{"abstract":"起初，谢尔兹镇的人叫他“狗见愁”，以为他只是个爱扇狗的怪胎。
后来，蒙卡被他空手接白刃，巴基被他塞进大炮。
所有人：“不是，他凭什么这么硬啊？！”
鹰眼挥出世界最强斩击，林雷拍了拍胸口的灰：就这？
赤犬发动流星火山，林雷：有点烫，建议与冰可乐同时服用。反手一个大逼兜！
战国：林雷，你到底想要什么？
林雷：我只想安安静静地叠个血，谁让你们长了一张欠扇的脸？
结果：四皇怂了，大将懵了，五老星开始怀疑人生了。
最强反差：长着最清秀的脸，叠着最厚的血，下着最狠的手！
